title: Realistic Animals
description: A resourcepack that changes the appearance of some of the vanilla animals!
body:
![Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Realistic_Animals/BH_Realistic_Animals_header.webp) This resourcepack changes the appearance of many of Minecraft's vanilla animals! Specifically, for now it changes the appearance of the following animals (although there are many more textures on the way): - Cows - Sheeps - Pigs - Ocelots - Wolves - Cats - Panda - Mooshroom - Camel - Camel Husk - Turtles - Horses Requires EMF or ETF (also works with OptiFine). The designer of the textures and models of the cows, sheeps and pigs is AviArt. The designer of the textures and models of the ocelots, wolves and cats is Matt_Hopes. ### Do you need a server to play with your friends?

For exceptional server hosting services, look no further than **[BisectHosting](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)**. Of course, you can install all the mods or modpacks you want, and their support team is always available to help you. **[With the code "Lupin" you will get a 25% discount! Click here!](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)** ![Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Realistic_Animals/BH_Realistic_Animals_summary.webp) This resourcepack changes the look of some of the community's most beloved vanilla animals, and of course now, they will look more realistic and fun! But don't worry, they'll still do it in a vanilla-friendly way, while still being somewhat similar to the default textures. ![FAQ](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Realistic_Animals/BH_Realistic_Animals_faq.webp) ### Does it work on servers? ### Sure! Remember that the best way to play with mods and friends is with BisectHosting, and by **[clicking on this link you can get a 25% discount](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin).** ### Can this resourcepack be used in modpacks? ### Of course! As long as it is published only on Modrinth or CurseForge. Uploading it to any other platform would be violating our rights and is not allowed at all. However, we are really grateful if you consider adding it to your Modrinth or CurseForge modpack. If you need any small changes or have any questions, contact us! ![Screenshots](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Realistic_Animals/BH_Realistic_Animals_screenshots.webp) ![Screenshots 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/IpILXlDC/images/b56639c1c7a35236babd71f1d3662db545e2e590.png) ![Screenshots 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/IpILXlDC/images/0067cde744843ed0004aea262766853f7a494c66.jpeg) ![Screenshots 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/IpILXlDC/images/86b00f2415be1782dcb695e6ba96c00b3daac88d.jpeg)
